name: Crossroads
description: The Shadow Syndicate's shakedown crew is terrorizing merchants at Nexus Station's upper market.
narrativeIntro: With the Imperial garrison in retreat, a new threat has filled the vacuum. The Shadow Syndicate has claimed Nexus Station as their territory, extorting merchants and running protection rackets. Reports say a shakedown crew is roughing up traders in the upper market ring right now. Your rebel cell deploys to make first contact with this new enemy and send a message that the sector isn't theirs to take.
narrativeSuccess: The Syndicate Lieutenant hits the deck, and your team secures the marketplace. As you tend to the rattled merchants, you find a datapad on the unconscious officer. It references someone called 'The Broker' and a bounty board operation run out of a nearby station. The Shadow Syndicate is far more organized than a simple protection racket. This runs deep.
narrativeFailure: The Syndicate crew overwhelms your position, and the merchants scatter in panic. The upper market is now firmly under criminal control. Word spreads fast: the rebels couldn't even protect a handful of traders. The Shadow Syndicate tightens its grip on Nexus Station.

reinforcements.narrativeText: More Syndicate gunners burst through the service corridor!
A Trandoshan Hunter stalks through the market gates, scattergun raised.

objectives.description: Secure the merchant stalls before the Syndicate trashes them (interact with 3 stalls). 2+ secured = bonus XP and shop discount.

objectivePoints.description: Frightened Rodian merchant cowering behind a toppled display case.
Twi'lek trader barricaded behind overturned crates.
Injured Ithorian shopkeeper bleeding from a vibro-knife wound.
